name: Jordan Rivera
summary: Fullstack developer with 3 years of experience building web applications with React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Comfortable across the stack from REST API design to responsive UI implementation. Looking for a role where I can contribute to product development and grow as an engineer.

bullets: Built a customer dashboard with React and TypeScript that reduced support tickets by 35%
Designed and implemented REST API endpoints in Node.js and Express serving 10K+ daily requests
Improved PostgreSQL query performance by 40% through indexing and query optimization
Set up CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, cutting deployment time from 20 minutes to 5
Contributed to a React-based internal tool used by 200+ employees across 4 departments
Built REST API integrations with third-party services (Stripe, SendGrid) using Node.js
Wrote Jest unit and integration tests, increasing code coverage from 55% to 82%
Participated in code reviews and agile sprint planning with a 6-person engineering team

projects.name: Task Flow App
projects.description: A personal project management app with drag-and-drop boards and real-time updates.
bullets: Built with React, Express, and PostgreSQL; deployed on Render with CI/CD from GitHub
Implemented WebSocket-based live updates and optimistic UI for seamless task editing

projects.name: Open Source CLI Tool
projects.description: A command-line utility for scaffolding Express projects with common middleware preconfigured.
bullets: Published to npm with 150+ weekly downloads; maintained with monthly dependency updates
Written in Node.js with comprehensive Jest test suite and GitHub Actions CI
